channel.title: shorts on Kfkq
channel.description: Recent content in shorts on Kfkq

item.title: Dystopian Display of the Rafah Massacre
item.description: Abstract: I have never witnessed dystopia at this level before. The Western consumerist dystopia, with its demonic government, is enjoying the Super Bowl game while Israel airs propaganda ads amidst massacres in Rafah-Gaza, a refugee settlement of 2 million.

item.title: File-over-app Digital Philosophy
item.description: Abstract : I move beyond digital apps when it comes notes taking and journaling, why? Because controlling raw resources file is important. File over app is a philosophy where you get to control all file with formats that easy to read over long period of time, no matter how developed technology is. My aim is to create a digital artifact on my works.
